display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Your Previous Experience
• Do you have previous programming experience outside of a course?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Advanced Placement Courses
• Which AP or IB course did you complete?
• What was your score on the AP Computer Science A exam?
• What was your score on the IB Computer Science exam?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Topics and Constructs
• Variables and assignment statements
• Datatypes (e.g., `int`, `float`, `str`)
• Conditionals (e.g., `if` `else`)
• Loops
• Lists (or arrays)
• Dictionaries (or objects)
• Functions and Methods

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Code Assessment
• What is the output?
• Which of the following best describes your experience with the preceding problem
